case_title: BLUE MOON PERSONNEL INC VS ABRAMSON & SMITH ALBERT R ABRAMSON-SEN PARTNER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY BLUE MOON PERSONNEL INC AS TO DEFENDANT ABRAMSON & SMITH ALBERT R ABRAMSON-SEN PARTNER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-21-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ABRAMSON & SMITH ALBERT R ABRAMSON-SEN PARTNER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BLUE MOON PERSONNEL INC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ABRAMSON & SMITH ALBERT R ABRAMSON-SEN PARTNER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
